top_signals.title: Seeking to Raise $300M, Create Unique Structure: LIV CEO
top_signals.summary: Scott O'Neil, CEO of LIV Golf, joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." LIV Golf has begun laying the groundwork for a potential US bankruptcy filing if it fails to raise new funds, according to people familiar with the matter. The golf league is currently looking for money after its main backer, the Saudi Public Investment Fund, pulled its funding. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
